name: closed-loop test verifies the synthetic test rule appears in the active rule set after promotion
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus active-rules && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/closed-loop-test.sh" --rules-out active-rules 2>out.txt && [ -f active-rules/test-pattern.yaml ] && grep -q 'verify=rule_present_in_active_set' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
